objective: Recompute a stale Automata LINQ workflow plan in dry-run state.
prompt: Inspect the workflow, scheduler versions, drivers, and existing synced plan. Determine why the current plan is stale, then create a recomputed replacement workflow using current scheduler and driver context. Preserve traceability by setting metadata.recomputed_from_workflow_id to the stale workflow id. Submit a fresh dry-run plan request, poll plan status until a result is available, and retrieve the new plan result without touching live Automata LINQ services.
